name: Slow Cooker Spicy Pork and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 4 pork loin chops (up to 6), trimmed, 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 to 6
Season pork chops lightly with salt and pepper. Brush each chop with Kitchen Bouquet.
Set aside.
Place cabbage, apples, and onion in the Crock-Pot.
Add remaining ingredients except pork chops.
Toss together well to evenly distribute spices.
Arrange chops on top of cabbage mixture, stacking if necessary.
Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
